title: A Genetic and Biochemical Reassessment of Acute Intermittent Porphyria in Psychiatric Disorders
description: Code supporting a reassessment of whether pathogenic HMBS variants — which cause acute intermittent porphyria (AIP) — are enriched in psychiatric populations. The repository contains a phenome-wide association study in the All of Us Research Program (v8) and a rare-variant burden ("collapsing") analysis in the SCHEMA and BipEx cohorts. Shahil Pema and Dany A. Issa contributed equally (co-first authors).
